title: Newtonia warmingii

intro: Newtonia warmingii, commonly known as Warming's Newtonia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various ailments, with reported health benefits including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may aid in reducing symptoms of fever, pain, and digestive issues.
